business.name: Chattanooga Handyman
business.tagline: The fix you need, when you need it

hero.headline: *One call* handles it all
hero.subheadline: From squeaky hinges to full kitchen installs — we're the Chattanooga crew that actually shows up on time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every Fix Under One Roof
services_section.subheading: Why call five different contractors when one phone call gets it done?

services.title: Kitchen & Bath Updates
services.description: New faucets, cabinet hardware, tile work, vanity installs — we handle the upgrades that make your space feel brand new.

services.title: Electrical & Plumbing Fixes
services.description: Outlets not working? Toilet running? We tackle the electrical and plumbing repairs that other guys won't touch.

services.title: Carpentry & Repairs
services.description: Loose railings, squeaky floors, trim work, deck repairs — if it's wood and it's broken, we'll make it solid again.

services.title: Drywall & Painting
services.description: Patch holes, fix cracks, fresh paint — we prep and paint until your walls look like they were never damaged.

services.title: Door & Window Service
services.description: Sticky doors, broken locks, window screens, weatherstripping — we make sure everything opens, closes, and seals tight.

services.title: Furniture Assembly
services.description: IKEA nightmares, office furniture, playground sets — bring us the box and the instructions, we'll handle the rest.

about.heading: Chattanooga's Go-To Fix-It Crew
about.body: We're the handyman service Chattanooga calls when something needs doing right. No project too big, no repair too small — just honest work at fair prices. From Lookout Mountain to downtown, we keep homes and businesses running smooth.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Greater Chattanooga
service_areas.subheading: Fast, reliable handyman service throughout the Tennessee Valley

cta.heading: Ready to Cross It Off Your List?
cta.body: Stop putting off that repair. One call gets your project scheduled, quoted, and handled by pros who show up when they say they will.
